'''tawufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okole|okole]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okole|okole]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tawufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || tæwifith || tæwifij || tæwifish || tæwifi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || tawuwufuth || tawuwufuj || tawuwufush || tawuwufu
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || tawufuth || tawufuj || tawufush || tawufu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || tawuffufth || tawuffufj || tawuffufsh || tawuffuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || tawufuthu || tawufuju || tawufushu || tawufuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || tawufuth || tawufuj || tawufush || tawufu
|-
| [[Possessive]] || tawufuthul || tawufujul || tawufushul || tawufukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || tawufuuthuthu || tawufuujuju || tawufuushushu || tawufuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || tawufuthun || tawufujun || tawufushun || tawufukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || tawufuthuoro || tawufujuoro || tawufushuoro || tawufukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
